title: The Csardas Princess
writer: Leo Stein, Béla Jenbach, Georg Jacoby
actors: Mártha Eggerth, Hans Söhnker, Paul Kemp
plot: Sylva Varescu is an operetta singer performing Kálmán's Die Czardasfürstin through Europe with great success. Before going to Vienna she meets handsome Prinz Weylerstein and they fall in love. Offered a contract for America, she d...
